levels.name: Amethyst
levels.creator: iMist & more
levels.description: Former hardest level in the game, using gameplay elements from The Golden, consisting of a crystal cave themed top 1. Beware of the hyper-realistic spikes! You might not know what you die to

levels.name: Flamewall
levels.creator: UNarwall & more
levels.description: Legendary near 7 minute long fire themed megacollab that was verified after two 99% fails. This has some of the most intense gameplay ever conceived. The final boss of nerve control

levels.name: Nullscapes
levels.creator: ItzKiba
levels.description: The sequel to Shardscapes, meaning this is an entirely robot-based level with a plethora of corner jumps, this time with a bunch of green orb triple clicks and stupid hitboxes

levels.name: ORBIT
levels.creator: MindCap & more
levels.description: The first mythic classic extreme demon & it's an orb input only level. Do not fall into the pit, you might not climb out. This level pushed Tartarus into the Extended List and Crimson Planet into the Legacy List.

levels.name: Quanteuse processing
levels.creator: Renn241 & Blankb
levels.skillset: High CPS, timings, walter white monster
levels.description: Superbuffed Quantum Processing remake that has some of the most ridiculous hitboxes, gameplay and decoration ever conceived. Scientifically made to be atrocious

levels.name: Thinking Space II
levels.creator: CairoX & more
levels.description: The hardest level in the game, it being the official sequel to the beloved Thinking Space. This went unrated for months and is known for its ridiculous ending and waves

levels.name: Tidal Wave
levels.creator: OniLinkGD
levels.description: The former hardest level in the game, consisting of nearly 3 minutes of some of the hardest timings you'll ever see, along with some infamously long wave parts

levels.name: Acheron
levels.creator: ryamu & more
levels.description: Tartarus but grey. Similarly balanced, with this one having many more "go in there" moments. Beat this level to become a certified pro.

levels.name: Anathema
levels.creator: nikroplays & more
levels.description: SUPER DEMON that got stuck in development hell for several years. It shows its age, but serves as a great cap-off to the Dedication series. Accidentally has a fixed hitbox.

levels.name: andromeda
levels.creator: Insxne97
levels.description: Dark level with lots of cool spacey backgrounds that loves to flicker your icon (and everything else onscreen honestly), paired with a LOT of fast clicking

levels.name: Ashley Wave Trials
levels.creator: OddMod
levels.description: Wave only main list that takes you through the journey of Ashley's insanity. This is the first CBF verification that has stayed rated.

levels.name: Avernus
levels.creator: PockeWindfish
levels.description: Self-described "antagonist" to The Golden. Its gameplay follows a lot of similar tropes (mostly being really closed-in) but this time with a lava theme and even stupider hitboxes

levels.name: BOOBAWAMBA
levels.creator: Akunakunn, ygg24, TheLetterV
levels.description: The hardest memory demon. You can probably tell why it took a year to get 1 victor. Features a lot of classic Akunakunn level tropes, for better or for worse

levels.name: Every End
levels.creator: Mindcap & more
levels.description: The ultimate endurance test. Entirely made out of 1.0 elements (aside from the sweet background effect), making this the 'most accessible' level up here, but good luck...

levels.name: Penumbral
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: The first extreme using xStep by DVJI and it so happens to be a cherryteam level. Fun fact: every gamemode up to 45% is the exact same as xStep's.

levels.name: Silent clubstep
levels.creator: TheRealSailent
levels.description: Historic impossible level from 1.8 that remained unbeaten for eight years. Infamous for the hardest predrop in the game, being harder than 24-100 and having a ridiculous ship

levels.name: Subsuming Vortex
levels.creator: Septagon7 & Renn241
levels.description: Legendary former ILL top 1 Nine Circles level that has some of the most diabolical waves ever, which also includes a 240fps frame perfect release at 61%.

levels.name: Abyss of Darkness
levels.creator: Exen & more
levels.description: Crank ass old impossible level that got a redeco to bring it up to snuff with new decoration standards. The gameplay, however, remains in its hilariously stupid old state

levels.name: Based After Based
levels.creator: Akunakunn & more
levels.description: An all dual level featuring no spikes AND no wave! Was in development/verification/rate limbo for years before finally being finished/verified/rated.

levels.name: CHIL
levels.creator: McCoCo
levels.description: A pure solo project which started out in early 2.2 and took over a year to verify. The visuals are extremely trippy with brutal camera effect usage later in the level

levels.name: Defeated Circles
levels.creator: GXQ & more
levels.description: The hardest rated Nine Circles level inspired by the impossible challenge "you so defeated". This level features some ridiculous wave gaps and Zoink claims this is Top 50.

levels.name: KOCMOC
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: WATER if it locked the fuck out. Plays very similarly to Slaughterhouse, but this time with a lot of cool spacey decoration to look at. I hope it never gets unleashed...

levels.name: Kyouki
levels.creator: Demishio
levels.description: Solo level that got solo verified in 501,000 attempts. Very pretty and glowy, with the gameplay being very tight and forcing you to do a LOT of clicks

levels.name: Menace
levels.creator: ArraegenGD
levels.description: Extremely high-quality solo level utilizing a lot of 2.2 features, making it unlike anything else to reach this high on the list in the past. Leans heavily into some funky dual techniques

levels.name: Sakupen Circles
levels.creator: Nick24 & more
levels.skillset: wave, wave, wave, unbalanced, high CPS
levels.description: 1.9 impossible level initially made as a joke that got redecorated and verified. The predrop is incredibly easy before throwing you into the hardest waves you've ever seen. Wait.. wasn't this said about another level?

levels.name: Slaughterhouse
levels.creator: IcEDCave & more
levels.description: Very red and very stupid. Makes you sit through a full 30 seconds of predrop before instantly dropping you into the hardest waves you've ever seen. Was initially hack-verified

levels.name: Spectre
levels.creator: xander556 & more
levels.description: The official sequel to Zodiac, sharing a lot of similarities with its younger brother. Not hack verified

levels.name: Subterminal Point
levels.creator: SyQual
levels.description: Much chiller Trueffet sequel based on the same game as its predecessor. What this level lacks in intensity it makes up for with its hilariously stupid hitboxes

levels.name: The Lightning Rod
levels.creator: Lavatrex
levels.description: Very electric solo level as well as solo verification. Uses a LOT of unique gameplay elements, as well as rather unconventional decoration. Strange mix of learny+skill that works

levels.name: Tunnel of Despair
levels.creator: Exen & ivyteal
levels.description: The name isn't lying, the entire drop of this level is basically just one extremely long tunnel filled with spikes crammed in every corner and utilizing every gamemode. Cube...

levels.name: zorin
levels.creator: SnowEye
levels.description: A very vibrant no-spike level with lots of visual references to tons of different media. Has an insane wave/swing dual about a minute in. Electroman Adventures is currently going for this.

levels.name: Apocalyptic Trilogy
levels.creator: APTeamOfficial
levels.description: Long awaited APTeam project that combined the entire Apocalyptic Trilogy into one level, buffing all of the levels. Surprisingly isn't very good. The endscreen is also as long as kowareta is

levels.name: BEING HOME
levels.creator: Turtl123 & goobs47
levels.description: Another Lotus Flower inspired demon. Timing map with lots of silly duals, the last of which is notably offset. Contains lots of strange orb mechanisms

levels.name: Calibrate
levels.creator: Bamvie
levels.description: Unofficial addon to the ZAPHKIEL series and an overall remake of Calibre. There is a lot of fast waves and such, whilst bringing back old school style deco and GP to the party

levels.name: COMBUSTION
levels.creator: Cersia & Slithium
levels.description: Design level that likes to make you go in a lot of REALLY tight gaps. I'm pretty sure there's a ship frame perfect in there somewhere

levels.name: CONVULSION
levels.creator: Stellar
levels.description: The current hardest 1.9 GDPS level. The decoration features Stellar's trademark chaotic flashes and pulses that are blue, red and purple

levels.name: Deadlier Clubstep
levels.creator: herozombie80 & more
levels.description: The final boss of the "object barf" style of core that lots of 1.6 GDPS levels like to use. This level, unfortunately, has a mostly standard gameplay style unlike most core

levels.name: Deimos
levels.creator: ItsHybrid & more
levels.description: Megacollab that got stuck in development hell for several years. Despite lots of the parts being very clearly dated, they mesh together extremely well with the new ones

levels.name: Eyes in the Water
levels.creator: nothawkyre & more
levels.description: Famous for its incredibly high CPS drop and its start-stop style of gameplay to match the song. Is very contentious whether or not it's memory, for some reason

levels.name: Firework
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: Gray clicksync level with lots of orbs. Particularly famous for its money shots, such as the infamous wave, orb ship, and even silly skull endscreen

levels.name: KOSETSU
levels.creator: fwefwe & more
levels.description: Very icy level with some neat atmosphere, especially for a level this hard. Gameplay has a lot of silly-looking timings, but what else is new

levels.name: MINUSdry
levels.creator: CDMusic, Varium, & Sevant
levels.description: Design level with lots of stupid timings and even stupider ships that like to flash text at you. Don't get wet...

levels.name: NOMAD
levels.creator: ReeseVT
levels.description: Very very RUST coded level but instead of it focusing on cube timings, it's with ship. This radiohead song in particular that's used does sound pretty similar to Creo - Outlaw.

levels.name: poocubed
levels.creator: Liisp & more
levels.description: About what you'd expect. Cutesy decoration paired with a lot of stupid-looking gameplay that really doesn't feel like it should be this hard

levels.name: Saul Goodman
levels.creator: Renn241 & more
levels.description: The finale of the Breaking Bad series. Basically just Renn & friends goofing off and making a megacollab for fun that still came out to be epic-worthy

levels.name: Sevvend Clubstep
levels.creator: cherryteam & more
levels.description: The final level in a trilogy that Cherryteam made apparently. Basically just higher budger Gaming 35, with much harder gameplay and no relation to Clubstep whatsoever

levels.name: Silentlocked
levels.creator: GDSkele & more
levels.description: A superbuffed Deadlocked version that was originally SILENT, but was nerfed. It has a bunch of ridiculous looking waves, timings and random spams. I like this part :)

levels.name: Snowbound
levels.creator: amplitron
levels.description: Amplitrons 3rd rated list demon that focuses on the theme of winter during it's night and day cycles. There is a LOT of high cps bursts so beware...

levels.name: The Hallucination
levels.creator: SyQual & VoTcHi
levels.description: Nine Circles level with a LOT of gamemode changes, making this essentially the first flow NC level. Very intricate designs in the wave, paired with a silly yet awesome song

levels.name: The Salt Factory
levels.creator: Nickname09 & more
levels.description: Super awesome super meat boy inspired level. Extremely russian gp, feels very similar to bpata mpaka! Dont get salty playing it :3

levels.name: Through The Gates
levels.creator: TeamTheDashers & more
levels.description: Old impossible megacollab from 2018 that was verified by Exen Zoink. The balancing is all over the place and the last 20% having the most unreal chokepoints ever.

levels.name: Voltage
levels.creator: ThePurgatory & more
levels.description: Basically Mayhem 2, with it's similarities with click-sync and comes with some really stupid inputs. Have fun with the sleeper UFO at the start!

levels.name: Belladonna
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: Layout level that likes to make you do a LOT of really fast clicking. Was grossly underrated for months because nobody wanted to play it

levels.name: BRITNEY NO SCLEARS
levels.creator: wabas
levels.description: It's Britney, Bitch. SARY NEVER CLEAR inspired level utilizing its very punchy and slow paced song to its advantage. Also there's a lot of frame perfects scattered about.

levels.name: CHROMACAVE
levels.creator: HappyMoby
levels.description: Primarily red, blue, and green level with a classic song and a lot of ridiculously tight wave parts. Has a strong affinity for the tiny spikes with the fat hitboxes (you know the ones)

levels.name: Climax
levels.creator: HushLC & wWain
levels.description: Kyouki on a diet

levels.name: Codependence
levels.creator: TCTeam
levels.description: Hence the name, yet another 2p level. Played in "splitscreen", with the two players separated into the top and bottom halves of the screen. Two insane demons in a trenchcoat

levels.name: Collapse
levels.creator: rnexel
levels.description: Fully solo level using the latter part of Infernoplex. Uses the song to build intensity through the entire level and has a very long dash orb near the end to drop off into the last parts.

levels.name: Damascus
levels.creator: Dzeser & more
levels.description: Rob Buck explains better than I ever could: "the aim is to hopefully produce a level that will almost act as a montage of scattered memories projected from the creating era."

levels.name: Decks Dark
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: Heavily inspired off of Lotus Flower, hence using a radiohead song. It's taken place in a desert and a black hole appears too. Prepare yourself for some insane duals too

levels.name: Edge of Destiny
levels.creator: CDMusic & more
levels.description: Blade of Justice remake that compromises none of the badassness of the original, making use of some pretty sweet tech-style decoration. Are you worthy?

levels.name: Fracture
levels.creator: Arrowgazi & Destroyer0912
levels.description: A very Arctic Lights reminiscent Nine Circles level. Is very fast paced and flashy, as per usual when it comes to listworthy NC levels.

levels.name: Gaggatrondra
levels.creator: JCMoon
levels.description: Bright and flashy level with intimidatingly learny gameplay. Self-proclaimed "zuntiest extreme demon"

levels.name: Infinite Chaos
levels.creator: CairoX & more
levels.description: The final level of the Lucid Nightmares trilogy & CairoX's most heartfelt project yet, with it being in the works for over 3 years. Bring Me The Chaos

levels.name: LIMBO
levels.creator: MindCap & more
levels.description: LEGENDARY DEMON memory level, most famous for its randomized keys ending. Very purple megacollab with lots of very old parts due to how long it was in development

levels.name: Loops of Fury
levels.creator: Enfur
levels.description: Enfur's most heartfelt project yet, being built to honor their father's passing. Contains very high CPS gameplay and a section in the middle that fittingly loops

levels.name: Mayhem
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: This level is so bad the creators wanted it deleted after it had already been rated. Probably the most egregious example of "LVC balancing"

levels.name: Midnight
levels.creator: MadisonYuko
levels.description: Very colorful and flashy effect level that likes to throw a lot of clicks at you (and an offset dual)

levels.name: Operation Evolution
levels.creator: Halzion & more
levels.description: What do you get when you mix some of TMco, 1.9 and Dimrain47? You get this absolute behemoth of a 1.9 memory level with a whopping 5 minute runtime. Don't choke!

levels.name: ORDINARY
levels.creator: vit12 & more
levels.description: LET THE WORLD JUST PASS ME BYYyYYY, PAAAIN PILLSS, NIIICE CLOTHESS, IF I FALL I THINK ILL FLYYyYYY... TOOOUCH MEEEE, MIIIIDAS, MAKE ME PART OF YOUR DESIIIiIIIGN

levels.name: SARYYX NEVER CLEAR
levels.creator: aartos & more
levels.description: SARY NEVER CLEAR except way harder, made in 1.9, and apparently loosely based on Alphabet X for some reason??

levels.name: Sinister Silence
levels.creator: Wahffle & more
levels.description: This ENTIRE level requires you to lock in, making this one of the scariest things to pick up and play

levels.name: Solar Flare
levels.creator: Linear2 & Rynoxiouss
levels.description: The hardest rated nine circles level that matters. Extremely pretty decoration paired with very unique structuring for a NC level

levels.name: Stellar Night
levels.creator: IcEDCave
levels.description: Another UDL gem that was rated in the same ratewave as Diabolic ClubStep. This time, icedcave takes an approach at making flow gameplay and it's very well received.

levels.name: The Catacombs
levels.creator: Cersia & SnapShocked
levels.description: https://wiki.hypixel.net/Catacombs

levels.name: The Plunge
levels.creator: Dolabill & more
levels.description: Greyscale level where you plunge. It's kinda like an epic rate easy demon you'd see in the awarded tab, except main list with extremely tight clicks everywhere

levels.name: The Yangire
levels.creator: Dorami & more
levels.description: LEGENDARY DEMON that took several years to finally release. You can tell with how dated some of the parts are, but nevertheless they make it work in the modern day

levels.name: TrakineS
levels.creator: Laranjoo & more
levels.description: Yet, another spikeless main list. Very teal and very blue and for some reason the song keeps doing OI and AI throughout the level.

levels.name: walter white
levels.creator: Renn241 & GhostVandalf
levels.description: Standard Renn level with their signature gameplay style, but this time GhostVandalf takes it away with a couple of pretty badass parts near the ending

levels.name: Wavterminal
levels.creator: Skyavoxii
levels.description: Prepare yourself for a relatively crazy eyemelt experience with the effects this levels has, which includes click sync and very satisfying gameplay.

levels.name: arcturus
levels.creator: maxfs
levels.description: Short and very red level famous for its dual wave. The younger cousin of Slaughterhouse that never tasted the #1 glory

levels.name: ATOMIC CANNON Mk III
levels.creator: LIEB & more
levels.description: The third level in Lieb's ATOMIC CANNON series, once again upping the difficulty and throwing in some of the hardest timing gameplay seen thus far in the series

levels.name: BEELINE
levels.creator: Galaxxyss & more
levels.description: "BEELINE by Galaxxyss & more is a fun and colorful 2-player level with lots of personality" - Geometry Dash Today

levels.name: BPATA MPAKA
levels.creator: Inex & more
levels.description: Fully grayscale Russian level that has a song that sounds like its supposed to be over a documentary on the industrial period. Very unbalanced clicks and chokepoints ahem 77

levels.name: Checked Steam
levels.creator: Satan
levels.description: Joke solo level with one of the worst reputations and some of the most abhorrent gameplay ever made. We Love Spam!! Whizkid PLEASE stop giving verification donations

levels.name: Cimmerian Shade
levels.creator: SrGuillester & AZuLer4
levels.description: An old impossible level originally built in 2017 by SrGuillester that was verified in 2023 by spcreat, featuring incredibly hard waves and blind gameplay

levels.name: Coalescence
levels.creator: amplitron & more
levels.description: The sequel to shimmer mixed with fog, with a randomized memory section at the end and some very enjoyable gameplay for most

levels.name: Delta
levels.creator: Drakosa & more
levels.description: Spinoff of the Greek Letter Trilogy, providing a faithful modern interpretation of the series. Previously disowned by Kappa, Omicron, and Epsilon. DiamondSplash beat this 347 times

levels.name: Diabolic ClubStep
levels.creator: Sevant
levels.description: Redecoration of an old impossible level, Satanic Clubstep, and retrospective former top 1 that was left to rot on the UDL for nearly 5 years. It has that funny wave.

levels.name: DreamStep
levels.creator: Blaster1337 & more
levels.description: Very blue 2.0 styled level with some pretty consistently fast gameplay. Temmie appears too which is awesome love Temmie 💙

levels.name: Dualist
levels.creator: Syncroned & Cluncherp
levels.description: A Codep-esque 2P level where one side is design styled and the other is more modern styled. Uses the split corridors throughout the whole level with pretty standard gameplay on both sides. List players hate them!

levels.name: Jigsaw
levels.creator: NEKONGAMES & more
levels.description: Extremely edgy level based off the horror movie series "Saw", this level is quite unbalanced with many chokepoints, also with one of the hardest last clicks in any level

levels.name: Levigo
levels.creator: Swib
levels.description: A modernized RUST inspired level that pushes the gameplay style to its fullest potential. Was a UDL mainstay for quite some time. You Are Doing Good Cuh

levels.name: Natural Disaster
levels.creator: iIiLaSeRiIi & more
levels.description: Super Green wave heavy level that makes you respect the planet. Was not only previously top 1, but also redecorated due to an incident that caused the original to be unrated

levels.name: NETWORK
levels.creator: Agat3, theworldofme, & KazaGD
levels.description: Sequel to Framework that ups the flashiness and HEAVILY ups the CPS, including one of the highest CPS spider parts in the game. Surprisingly gets mistaken for Acheron a lot

levels.name: Oblivion
levels.creator: benji8080 & more
levels.description: Cognition sequel that took a very long time to get rated. Extremely accessible for people, and the most jumped to mainlist alongside UNKNOWN

levels.name: PSYCHOPATH
levels.creator: DeniPol
levels.description: The first 2.2 main list. Features a lot of incohesion, spammy gameplay, and oddly shares a song with Sedulous. The first level to be unrated for CBF usage

levels.name: Shukketsu
levels.creator: MadisonYuko & more
levels.description: Very cute and very flowery level that loves to shove as many things into the block design as possible. Very closed-in gameplay that likes to throw portals and orbs at you rapidly

levels.name: Sonic Wave Infinity
levels.creator: APTeamOfficial
levels.description: After several years of development hell, APTeam were the ones to finally get this thing out the door. It plays about as well as you'd expect a superbuffed Sonic Wave to play

levels.name: Tartarus
levels.creator: Riot & more
levels.description: One of the most popular former top 1s, lasting for two years until Slaughterhouse dethroned it. Infamous for the most "go in there 👉" ships, such as the fixed hitbox chokepoints

levels.name: Terminal Rampancy
levels.creator: Xyriak
levels.description: New futuristic block design? 👀 (Badass tech-themed level with a LOT of objects, making this pretty laggy. Unfortunately can hinder the playing experience with how tight it gets

levels.name: The Golden
levels.creator: BoBoBoBoBoBoBo & more
levels.description: Famous green level and former top 1, this level is renowned for its good gameplay and wave sections. had a battle for #1 with tartarus for which was harder back in 2020

levels.name: THE JET ENGINE
levels.creator: Billzer
levels.description: A mostly black and white memory level involving some incredibly unique gimmicks and a weirdly fitting song. Don't play if you have frequent premonitions

levels.name: The Wonder of You
levels.creator: Hangerlord
levels.description: A very monochrome level from the mind of HangerLord. In typical HangerLord fashion, the gameplay is very claustrophobic, with lots of burst waves.

levels.name: UNKNOWN
levels.creator: NineDice & more
levels.description: Ultra wave carried demon with crazy chokepoints and very cool atomosphere, the favorite of many wave carried jumpers

levels.name: Verdant Landscape
levels.creator: ItzNisha
levels.description: Windy Landscape inspired fully solo level with a heavy emphasis on fast cube timings and the color green

levels.name: Viprin UFO
levels.creator: nothawkyre & more
levels.description: Wacky ufo only level based on the notion that all of ViPriN UFO parts suck. The level, surpursingly, does not

levels.name: Waterfall
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: Alleged "Firework sequel" that doesn't really have anything to do with its predecessor. Regardless, it looks pretty cool and has an Evil Skull

levels.name: Aerial Gleam
levels.creator: EndLevel & more
levels.description: Hit or miss stormy nine circles level that gets progressively more and more chaotic before calming down at the end. The hitboxes get freaky in the second half

levels.name: Axinie
levels.creator: SaturMan
levels.description: Entirely pink and blue level with the biggest wave chokepoints you'll ever see in this difficulty range, borderline non functional duals

levels.name: azure blast
levels.creator: AlbinoSnail & more
levels.description: Korean collab that uses a song that would fit in the average 3D intro for a youtube video in like 2015. It's also the hardest level that uses an NCS song.

levels.name: Blood Echo
levels.creator: Farva & more
levels.description: Death Corridor inspired level that is the sequel to the unrated level "Haunted Corridor". There's a bunch of really tight waves and swiborg considers this easier than Bloodlust

levels.name: chrome hearts
levels.creator: roadkiller
levels.description: Iconic creator of ICDX, roadbose with his first epic rated level, with it being the end to the ICE Carbon series.

levels.name: Crackhead Circles
levels.creator: AlrexX & more
levels.description: Extremely flashy rainbow nine circles level with a Lil Darkie song and Silent clubstep balancing for whatever reason. I PROVIDE LEGAL SUBSTANCES =) // I LOVE MY STOVE

levels.name: Critical Heat
levels.creator: Zeniux & ZeusGD
levels.description: Really HOT! extreme that includes some insanely tight timings, a lot of clicksync, and an extrEmElY intense dual. Sorry for the voice crack in that last part. Hardest Peaceful level

levels.name: Crystal Crusher
levels.creator: Zeniux & ZeusGD
levels.description: 2-player level using the dual offset glitch making solo players quiver in fear. Deceivingly structured like a 1-player dual despite being quite possibly the hardest 2P extreme

levels.name: Dark Dimension
levels.creator: ThePurgatory & more
levels.description: ThePurgatory's most infamous level, which is just a buffed and redecorated version of Black Blizzard. Also known as 10 Hours Rain & Thunder | Rainstorm Sounds for Sleep, Studying or Relaxation | Nature White Noise

levels.name: Destruction 19
levels.creator: bosjoker
levels.description: The not-awaited sequel to IDL top 10, Destination 19. Super colorful while unfittingly using Amity as the song and features shityourpants waves

levels.name: DISCONNECT
levels.creator: McCres
levels.description: The sequel to CONNECT, with a whole bunch more effects that are meant to encapsulate the feelings of suicidal thoughts and others too.

levels.name: DISSONANCE
levels.creator: ivyteal
levels.description: ImMaxX's first big 2.2 project, using a song very fitting to the name and playing around with some very unique gameplay concepts

levels.name: Esfera
levels.creator: SyQual & more
levels.description: Very long Korean megacollab with lots of personality. Never lets up on the gameplay, even in break parts, so this level demands your focus the ENTIRE way

levels.name: Fragile
levels.creator: EndLevel & more
levels.description: Remake of kowareta and shibireta combined into a single level. No, the drop waves aren't nerfed, and yes, the first click is still bullshit

levels.name: Goober Rage Stage
levels.creator: bonscarrot & LameJesseGD
levels.description: A very silly all-robot level with references to various Kaizo legends. Was reverified 4 times. For reading this description, you get a free (uncredited) Goober Rage Stage thumbnail!

levels.name: Graceful
levels.creator: DaGYT & more
levels.description: Legendary modern themed level that FINALLY received a star rate after 2 decoration updates and 5 years of hope. Essentially just a pure endurance test, featuring incredibly mean chokepoints throughout

levels.name: Guideless Goobering
levels.creator: Enfur, Xuser, & Akunakunn
levels.description: The final level in Enfur's memory trilogy, bringing on the memory maestro Akunakun & Xuser. Includes one of the scariest duals in the game, and two signature evil endings

levels.name: Hard Machine
levels.creator: komp, nikroplays, viri
levels.description: Allegedly first made in 2014, and took 7 years to finally come out. Contains one of, if not the most asinine sets of chokepoints you've ever seen. Harder than ICDX

levels.name: Henken
levels.creator: PLoLek & more
levels.description: A megacollab with an entirely Polish creator roster which took 3 years to get rated, notable for its muted colours, timing-based gameplay and difficult wave sections near the end.

levels.name: in this
levels.creator: EnciGD
levels.description: While the level may only be 42 seconds long, this has some of the most unreal timings you've ever seen. Beware of the last 2 clicks...

levels.name: Judgement Knights
levels.creator: HangerLord & more
levels.description: Knights of Thunder sequel that uses lots of the same gameplay tropes, but does a lot more with them as well as making it look much prettier than its predecessor

levels.name: Kenos
levels.creator: npesta & more
levels.description: Sakupen Hell remake that remains iconic in many ways, despite its age and how dated it is. Beware the waves, knowing the level this is based on. 🔍 best gd reactions compilation

levels.name: limbo but uwu ig idk
levels.creator: Akunakunn
levels.skillset: Memowy!, what the hell is that wave
levels.description: Memowy wevew with many fuwcked uwp gamepway gimmicks ^w^, most notabwy the widicuwous wave pawt >w<. Wasn't wated fow 8 months becauwse Vipwin thouwght it was a joke wevew .w.

levels.name: Lotus Flower
levels.creator: StarkyTheSalad & zzzgecko
levels.description: Unique dual level famous for its offset ship duals. Gets its name from the Radiohead song it uses, so you know this level probably has a RYM account

levels.name: NEUTRA
levels.creator: Jenkins, Ilrell, Marwec
levels.description: Very learny and extremely flashy level famous for its amount of funky duals. The first extreme demon to be themed around its own vocaloid

levels.name: paranoia
levels.creator: amplitron
levels.description: Very floral Amplitron endeavor with their signature gameplay style with lots of tight ship and wave parts, tight timings, and CPS bursts

levels.name: Scream Machine
levels.creator: TMco & more
levels.description: Extremely foreboding and spooky level that demands your full attention the whole way through. The decoration combined with the song makes for some unmatched intensity

levels.name: Starlight Summit
levels.creator: Pengi1
levels.description: A fully solo, fully robot list demon themed around scaling a mountain using a song by famous Minecraft music artist C418. No strawberries exist on this mountain sadly

levels.name: Starlit Stroll
levels.creator: Enfur
levels.description: Extremely interesting level with alot of progression, getting harder throughout its runtime and going very well with the song, be afraid of the dual

levels.name: Swing Swing
levels.creator: KazaGD & more
levels.description: A level fully designed around the 2.2 Swing gamemode, designed as a way to teach higher end players about the gamemode and its many quirks

levels.name: The Paroxysm of Rage
levels.creator: Zacanaii & Evil Buds
levels.description: Remake of Paroxysm that upgrades the level both visually and in the difficulty department. RG is a pretty big fan of this one

levels.name: Time Lapse
levels.creator: HappyMoby
levels.description: This may as well be the first AI generated list demon, it relatively plays like a cherryteam level. Also likes to have a floating ball going with a sound of dubstep

levels.name: Trueffet
levels.creator: SyQual & Rainstorm
levels.description: EXTREMELY tight and very clicky level with a LOT of parts that almost count as straight-up spam. Thankfully not nearly as reliant on fixed hitboxes as its sister Subterminal Point

levels.name: VOID
levels.creator: nikoberry
levels.description: The sequel to nikoberry's unrated level "abyss", notoriously known to have one of the hardest ship segments in any rated extreme

levels.name: WOBBLING MACHINE
levels.creator: Smarted
levels.description: 1.9 decorated 2-player level that was originally hack verified by Rubix and took nearly 2 years for it to be re-rated again. Don't be deceived by how the duals look!

levels.name: Zodiac
levels.creator: BIANOX & more
levels.description: "Former hack-verified top 1 that serves as a unique mental challenge above all else. BEWARE OF 79%" -Technical

levels.name: Ascent
levels.creator: Rimexon & more
levels.description: Teal glow level with Aspects. It has many Designs and Details in it that are "Pleasing." Contains the most laggy unfitting endscreen since Ballistic Funk

levels.name: ATOMIC CANNON Mk II
levels.creator: LIEB, Giron, & BIANOX
levels.description: More of the ATOMIC CANNON formula we all know and love. Thankfully, this one chills out a lot in the predrop, giving you ample rest time before the drop goes apeshit

levels.name: Axiom Asterism
levels.creator: filqh & fusion425
levels.description: Official sequel to Infinite Inversion that kinda resembles The Hallucination, mostly with the structuring of the drop with its many similar gamemode switches and teleports.

levels.name: Calculator Core
levels.creator: Walroose & more
levels.description: Kenos/Bloodlust/Keres style rebirth of Artificial Ideology. Shockingly clean for how old it is, as well as keeping the gameplay similarly weird in its extension

levels.name: Call Me Maybe
levels.creator: nothawkyre & more
levels.description: HEY I JUST MET YOU, AND THIS IS CRAZY, SO HERES MY NUMBER, SO CALL ME MAYBE! IT'S HARD TO LOOK RIGHT, AT YOU BAAAABY, SO HERES MY NUMBER, SO CALL ME MAYBE!

levels.name: Cognition
levels.creator: EndLevel & benji8080
levels.description: Famously claustrophobic level known for its plethora of late orb timings, as well as unique song choice

levels.name: Cold Sweat
levels.creator: para, Wulzy, & Sminx
levels.description: The likely grandfather of "experimental levels" as they were known for several years afterwards. Famous for its UFO spam and ridiculous wave part

levels.name: ConClusion
levels.creator: DreamZoneGD
levels.description: The finale to DreamZoneGD 'con-' trilogy, taking all the effects and designs an entire level further. Remember to keep your sanity!

levels.name: CORRODERE
levels.creator: Moosh & more
levels.description: Very clean design megacollab that likes to throw a lot of silly gameplay quirks at you, most notably the Big Wave

levels.name: Cosmic Cyclone
levels.creator: APTeamOfficial
levels.description: The official sequel to Sonic Wave. "swi is a mcdonalds hamburger with no toppings cocy is a full Big Mac" - rito, 2022

levels.name: Crimson Planet
levels.creator: TrueOmega & more
levels.description: Former top 1 that didn't get rated until it wasn't top 1 anymore. Notable for its... uh... strange gameplay composition and not-so-clean decoration. Has a massive bird, though

levels.name: DIRECTIONS
levels.creator: wokecat & Nightning
levels.description: Beautiful mystical level that LOVES slope gameplay. I counted: before the drop, you only land on a flat surface one time. The entire drop is fast, learny, and mirrored, so watch out

levels.name: Disconnected Descent
levels.creator: TheSkeletonGMD & more
levels.description: The hardest medium tier. Quirked up Digital Descent remake with lots of aspects, made by lots of creators. Don't get tricked by the endscreen!

levels.name: Dry Out Copyable 2
levels.creator: tenzk & more
levels.description: Long and highly eclectic megacollab that you can tell these people had a blast making. Applies a tasteful amount of 2.2 features, not much beyond occasional bulgeshots

levels.name: Frost Spirit
levels.creator: Quaybus & more
levels.description: Very cold 1.9 GDPS megacollab that doesn't like to slow down once it gets going. Noticeably chokepoint carried, which only gets worse with a level of this length

levels.name: Galeforce
levels.creator: OniLinkGD
levels.description: A new OniLink extreme, this one taking place in a breathtaking verdant landscape. (waiiiit 👀) As it is an OniLink extreme, it has some insanely brutal waves. Also has a copy pasted wave, lol.

levels.name: Gloxinia
levels.creator: solarion & more
levels.description: Half-korean megacollab that features a bunch of old creators mixed with more active creators making for a wild card of styles throughout the parts

levels.name: Indivine
levels.creator: Mercury6779 & more
levels.description: Is this a Nine Circles level? Anyways, this level's decoration is insanely clean, and the song only accentuates its rainbowy coolness. Wave and ship carried, but like, in a cool way

levels.name: Instinct
levels.creator: Krazyman50
levels.description: Megacollab that got unleashed on everyone out of fucking nowhere, stealing the spotlight from Hybrid's Instinct. Very reminiscent of 2.0 megacollabs with its unique composition

levels.name: IRIS
levels.creator: KazaGD & more
levels.description: Very flashy art/design level that is essentially a really well put together homie collab. Rumor has it this level also built a part in GREIF.

levels.name: Keres
levels.creator: ItsHybrid & more
levels.description: The Kenos/Bloodlust equivalent to Erebus. This one somehow looks even more dated than those two despite being much newer

levels.name: Lithium
levels.creator: L4tezk & more
levels.description: High quality memory megacollab that took like 10 months and 30 mod sends to get rated for some reason. Pretty much every part is jam-packed with fakes

levels.name: Neon Skyline
levels.creator: reshiria
levels.description: Colorful city-themed level with immaculate vibes. Rough around the edges, as is its gameplay, but the song and decoration combo make this one of the friendliest levels out there

levels.name: Promethean
levels.creator: EndLevel & more
levels.description: Plays more like multiple challenges stringed together than an actual level if anything. One of the Great Unflukeables, Beware of the last ship

levels.name: qoUEO
levels.creator: GhostVandalf
levels.description: Wave challenge with a side of gameplay, and bad gameplay at that. Has a really cool vibe to it if you enjoy Watching

levels.name: Renevant
levels.creator: nikroplays
levels.description: Allegiance sequel almost entirely carried by various chokepoints. Regardless, it still stays true to the original with the limited visibility effect and all

levels.name: Rigel
levels.creator: Dan2D
levels.description: Very fast wave level with high-tech design and some dope space backgrounds. Built like a Nine Circles level but lacks the cascading effect

levels.name: SARY NEVER CLEAR
levels.creator: IIKugelBlitZII & more
levels.description: Remake of the Optic Sunflow classic. Features a lot of ridiculous chokepoints and broken English. Since it's (mostly) 1.6 gameplay, you can imagine what the experience is like

levels.name: Scrubbabingo force
levels.creator: Akunakunn & Shubhy
levels.description: Chaotic evil superbuffed Hexagon Force memory remake ("Quantum Force" if you will) with desynced duals and the classic Akunakun impossible ship ending

levels.name: shimmer
levels.creator: amplitron
levels.description: The hardest rated level built for Zeronium CC1, with it placing decently high for that. Has extremely click-heavy gameplay and some of the tightest waves you'll see in Extended

levels.name: Sky Shredder
levels.creator: Dorvict
levels.description: Formerly the hardest 1.9 GDPS level. Known for its closed-in gameplay that spans for the entire level, enforced by a lot of tiny asshole spikes everywhere

levels.name: ta1LSD0ll
levels.creator: ta1lsdoll
levels.description: Short level with extremely noisy decoration and a difficult wave section for the entire drop. Might as well be a memory level with how hard to see it is. Don't wait on the title.

levels.name: Thinking Space
levels.creator: HidekiX
levels.description: Old impossible level from 2.0 that has an extremely hard second half. No coin victors will be executed, no exceptions

levels.name: Trotil
levels.creator: cherryteam
levels.description: Despite being on the cherryteam account, this level was built almost entirely by novice creators, giving it a shocking amount of personality

levels.name: Widestep
levels.creator: Demishio
levels.description: The middle child of Demishio's tremendous trio of solo extremes. Like the others, this one throws a lot of clicks and at you in quick succession, sorta like flow but also not really

levels.name: Calibrate
levels.creator: Bamvie
levels.description: Unofficial addon to the ZAPHKIEL series and an overall remake of Calibre. There is a lot of fast waves and such, whilst bringing back old school style deco and GP to the party

levels.name: cognitohazard
levels.creator: MercuryDT & more
levels.description: A level made to not be beaten or played for as long as possible, it does its job well. Featuring spams, memory, 2p duals, whizkid05, and all other sorts of horrid things

levels.name: Reconnected Recent
levels.creator: windyw & more
levels.description: A refreshing take on the Technology Trilogy series of levels. Features a lot of pretty interesting gimmicks and a really hard spider about halfway in.
